notableEvents.label: Jarren Duran GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to shortstop Ha-Seong Kim. Carlos Narváez out at 2nd. Jarren Duran out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: José Azócar singles on a ground ball to third baseman Caleb Durbin. José Azócar to 2nd. José Azócar advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Caleb Durbin.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida grounds out, second baseman Ozzie Albies to pitcher Robert Suarez.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran. Ha-Seong Kim scores.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds out, shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski called out on strikes.
